---
title: "Q2 — Pen writing-life: Z-test (left-sided)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q2
n <- 100; xbar <- 453; mu0 <- 460; s <- 25
se <- s / sqrt(n)
z <- (xbar - mu0)/se
p_value <- pnorm(z) # one-sided (less)
z; p_value

xs <- seq(-4,4,length=400); ys <- dnorm(xs)
plot(xs, ys, type='l', main='Q2: Z-test (left-sided)', ylab='Density')
abline(v=z, col='red')
polygon(c(min(xs), xs[xs<z], z), c(0, ys[xs<z], 0), col=rgb(0,0,1,0.3))
```

Compare p-value to 0.01 to decide.
